Equipment 
23 = Parenteral and Enteral Nutrition 
Null/missing = Unknown 

COMMENT: For each pharmacy, there is information for up to three dispenser types (reference 
PRIMARY_DISPENSER_TYPE and TERTIARY_DISPENSER_TYPE variables). 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
